generated_sql: SELECT o.customer_id, SUM(od.unit_price * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount)) AS net_revenue FROM erp_core.orders AS o JOIN erp_core.order_details AS od ON od.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_date >= CAST('2025-01-01' AS DATE) AND o.order_date <= CAST('2025-12-31' AS DATE) GROUP BY o.customer_id ORDER BY net_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

validation_results.effective_sql: SELECT o.customer_id, SUM(od.unit_price * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount)) AS net_revenue FROM erp_core.orders AS o JOIN erp_core.order_details AS od ON od.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_date >= CAST('2025-01-01' AS DATE) AND o.order_date <= CAST('2025-12-31' AS DATE) GROUP BY o.customer_id ORDER BY net_revenue DESC LIMIT 10
